nodes.name: 约翰·古尔德
nodes.summary: 约翰·古尔德是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联71种鸟类，包括绿棉凫、凍原豆雁、黄腹角雉等71种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Grey falcon
nodes.summary: Grey falcon（Grey falcon，学名 Falco hypoleucos），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要分布于约翰·古尔德，常见栖息地包括灌丛、稀树草原。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The grey falcon (Falco hypoleucos) is a medium-sized falcon native to Australia, possibly the rarest.{{cite journal |doi=10.1017/S0959270920000106 |title=Phylogeography of the rare Australian endemic Grey Falcon Falco hypoleucos: implications for conservation |journal=Bird Conservation International|volume=287 |pages=447–455 |year=2020 |last1=Mullin|first1=Dale W

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits Triodia grassland, Acacia shrubland, and lightly timbered arid woodland. It has been sighted over most of mainland Australia except for Cape York

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits Triodia grassland, Acacia shrubland, and lightly timbered arid woodland. It has been sighted over most of mainland Australia except for Cape York
